title: 6Pack Dragon Eggs with Dragon Inside - 3D Printed Dragon in Egg Set Fidget Animals Toy - Easter Basket Fillers - Mythical Pieces Articulated Mobility Decor for Home Office & Easter Gifts ( Multicolor)
features: Fantasy Unboxing Surprise: Each 3D-printed dragon egg contains a beautifully articulated dragon, with six different designs to satisfy collectors! Rotate and manipulate the dragon's head, scales, and tail to spark imagination. It's both a stress-relief toy and a unique fantasy decoration, perfect for exploration by both children and adults.

Vibrant Design: This six-pack of dragon eggs features a variety of bright colors, full of energy. They can be freely arranged to create miniature fantasy scenes, adding a mysterious atmosphere to your home or office while inspiring creativity and conversation.

Movable Toys: Each dragon has articulated joints, allowing for flexible poses that are perfect for play and display. They serve as both toys and unique decorations. Their compact size makes them easy to carry, ideal for holiday parties, classroom rewards, or stress relief at your desk.

High-Precision 3D Craftsmanship: Crafted using advanced 3D printing technology, these toys are safe and non-toxic. The dragon's body features intricate textures, and the egg shell has a realistic crack design. The materials are eco-friendly and sturdy. The flexible joints withstand repeated play without damage, combining artistic appeal with durability.

Perfect Gift Choice: This dragon egg set is an ideal filler for Easter baskets, birthday surprises, and gifts for other occasions. It's both fun and creative, sure to captivate children and keep them engaged.
